title: BARC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 105 Junior Research Fellowship Posts
description: Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC) has declared the latest job notification for 2026. To fill up the 105 Junior Research Fellowship Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, B.Sc, and M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the BARC Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
